input.instructions: Identify the theoretical value of the Delta_3 statistic for a standard Gaussian Unitary Ensemble (GUE), which represents the spectral rigidity of a typical Hermitian matrix, specifically focusing on the value 0.24 mentioned in the problem context.

variables.selected_prompt_text:

}
